title: hack/release.sh: Add a guard against -dev suffixes for argv[2]
body:
Because it's easier to recover from that if we fail early instead of going through and creating a "Bump to v1.2.3-dev-dev" commit, etc.

cc @rhatdan.

comments.body: Will call this stop @rhatdan from making mistakes.
